description: Create comprehensive evidence summary visualization for Mcad GO:0070991 evaluation
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))
fig.suptitle('Evidence Summary: Drosophila Mcad (Q9VSA3) — GO:0070991\nMedium-chain fatty acyl-CoA dehydrogenase activity', 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Panel 1: Active site conservation bar chart
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
categories = ['Catalytic\nGlu', 'FAD\nbinding', 'Substrate\nbinding', 'Overall\nkey residues']
identical = [1, 7, 12, 20]
total = [1, 7, 13, 21]
pct = [i/t*100 for i, t in zip(identical, total)]

bars = ax1.bar(categories, pct, color=['#2ecc71', '#3498db', '#e67e22', '#9b59b6'], 
               edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 110)
ax1.set_ylabel('% Identical', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_title('Active Site / Key Residue Conservation\n(vs Human ACADM P11310)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
for bar, i, t in zip(bars, identical, total):
    ax1.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., bar.get_height() + 2, 
             f'{i}/{t}', ha='center', va='bottom', fontweight='bold', fontsize=10)
ax1.axhline(y=100, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)
ax1.axhline(y=50, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)

# Panel 2: Domain classifier agreement
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
classifiers = ['CDD\ncd01157', 'InterPro\nIPR034180', 'PANTHER\nPTHR48083:SF2', 'Pfam\nAcyl-CoA_dh', 'EC\n1.3.8.7']
classifications = ['MCAD', 'MCAD', 'MCAD', 'ACAD family', 'MCAD']
colors = ['#2ecc71' if c == 'MCAD' else '#f1c40f' for c in classifications]

bars2 = ax2.barh(classifiers, [1]*5, color=colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_xlim(0, 1.5)
ax2.set_xlabel('')
ax2.set_title('Domain Classifier Agreement\n(All classify as MCAD subfamily)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
for i, (bar, cls) in enumerate(zip(bars2, classifications)):
    ax2.text(0.5, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2., cls, 
             ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11, color='black')
ax2.set_xticks([])

legend_elements = [mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#2ecc71', label='MCAD-specific'),
                   mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#f1c40f', label='ACAD family (compatible)')]
ax2.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=9)

# Panel 3: Evidence lines for GO:0070991
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
evidence_types = ['IBA\n(Phylogenetic)', 'IMP\n(Mutant phenotype)', 'IEA\n(InterPro/EC)', 
                  'Sequence\nconservation', 'Domain\nclassification']
evidence_strength = [4, 3.5, 3, 5, 5]  # 1-5 scale
evidence_colors = ['#3498db', '#e74c3c', '#95a5a6', '#2ecc71', '#2ecc71']

bars3 = ax3.barh(evidence_types, evidence_strength, color=evidence_colors, 
                  edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.set_xlim(0, 6)
ax3.set_xlabel('Evidence Strength (1-5)', fontsize=11)
ax3.set_title('Lines of Evidence for GO:0070991', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
for bar, val in zip(bars3, evidence_strength):
    ax3.text(val + 0.1, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2., 
             f'{val:.1f}', ha='left', va='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=10)

legend3 = [mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#3498db', label='GO annotation'),
           mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#e74c3c', label='Experimental'),
           mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#95a5a6', label='Electronic'),
           mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#2ecc71', label='Computational (this study)')]
ax3.legend(handles=legend3, loc='lower right', fontsize=8)

# Panel 4: Drosophila ACAD family paralogs
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
paralogs = ['Mcad\n(Q9VSA3)', 'Arc42\n(SCAD)', 'CG4860\n(SCAD)', 'Acadvl\n(VLCAD)', 
            'GH07925p\n(SB-CAD)', 'Ivd\n(IVD)', 'CG9547\n(GCDH)']
chain_pref = ['C6-C12\nMedium', 'C4-C6\nShort', 'C4-C6\nShort', 'C14-C20\nVery long', 
              'C4-C6\nShort/branch', 'Branched\nchain', 'Glutaryl\n-CoA']
colors4 = ['#e74c3c', '#3498db', '#3498db', '#f39c12', '#9b59b6', '#1abc9c', '#95a5a6']

y_pos = np.arange(len(paralogs))
bars4 = ax4.barh(y_pos, [1]*len(paralogs), color=colors4, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax4.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax4.set_yticklabels(paralogs, fontsize=9)
ax4.set_title('Drosophila ACAD Family Paralogs\n(distinct substrate preferences)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax4.set_xticks([])

for i, (bar, pref) in enumerate(zip(bars4, chain_pref)):
    ax4.text(0.5, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2., pref, 
             ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold', fontsize=9, color='white')

# Highlight Mcad
bars4[0].set_edgecolor('red')
bars4[0].set_linewidth(3)

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.95])
plt.savefig('evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence summary figure saved.")
